purchase_count_basis: Millat screw pack alone is 260 screws; A/B rows cover loose bolt/nut/washer stock. Verify delivered quantities before buying any duplicate metric screws or bolts.
notes: Visible rusty M6/M8/M10-ish bolts and screws are mostly covered by MTL order rows; this is an old-sample visibility estimate, not a new buy count.

purchase_count_basis: Covered by Millat nut/bolt stock rows unless old-sample sorting finds a special nut style or captive nut.
notes: Counts visible loose nuts and nuts still sitting on old bolts where separable.

hardware_class: Flat/spring/star washers and standard body washers
purchase_count_basis: Flat/spring/star washer stock is covered by Millat A/B/D rows; finishing/cup washers are counted separately under trim hardware.
notes: Many washers are partly hidden under bolts; use this only as a sample-pile scale estimate.

purchase_count_basis: Use workbook Kit C planning basis before vendor quote: M6 captive/clip nuts x120, M8 captive/clip nuts x60, weld nuts M6 x30, weld nuts M8 x20, rivnuts M6 x30, rivnuts M8 x20. Confirm split against old samples.
notes: Visible count is old hardware only; buy basis intentionally exceeds the visible old count to cover full body hardware replacement.

purchase_count_basis: Buy after trim/panel alignment. Use old screws to confirm head style, length, diameter, thread type, and cup/finishing washer count.
notes: Includes pointed screws, countersunk/slotted screws, and finishing washer styles visible in the mixed pile.

purchase_count_basis: Buy an assorted plated/stainless pack around 40-60 pieces, then size-match critical locations against samples.
notes: Small wire clips are easy to miss in the pile; visible count is a lower-bound estimate.

hardware_class: Rubber/plastic bumpers knobs isolators and small spacers
purchase_count_basis: Sort by installed location, diameter, height, thread/stud size, and material hardness before buying sample-matched replacements.
notes: Do not merge into the body-mount rubber kit unless a sample proves a body-mount location.

hardware_class: Shoulder/pivot bolts cylindrical sleeves stand-off spacers and stepped pins
purchase_count_basis: Measure shoulder diameter, grip length, thread, sleeve OD/ID, and installed location before purchase or fabrication.
notes: Do not substitute fully threaded bolts where a shoulder/sleeve controls alignment.

hardware_class: Specialty brackets retainer plates captive-nut plates and straps
purchase_count_basis: Sort by installed location and function; refurbish only sound originals and buy/fabricate replacements for thin, bent, cracked, or damaged captive-thread plates.
notes: Visible rusted plates and retainers are not supplied by the Millat screw/nut/washer orders.

hardware_class: Overall visible individual hardware pieces in the mixed photo
purchase_count_basis: Rollup only; do not use as a purchase quantity. Use the category rows and procurement statuses.
notes: This sums category-level visible estimates and intentionally allows overlap/occlusion uncertainty.
